fiveStar.name: Royal Étoile
fiveStar.skill:
Increase critical damage by 36.3%/36.3%/47.2%/47.2%/58.1%/58.1%/69.0%.
When gaining a Step stack, increase Attack by 21.0%/27.0%/27.0%/33.0%/33.0%/39.0%/39.0% for 2 turns. This effect does not stack.
When an ally activates a Highlight, gain 1 Glass Slipper stack, and increase Kasumi's damage by 8.4%/11.1%/11.1%/13.8%/13.8%/16.5%/16.5% for 3 turns. Stacks up to 2 times.
When Glass Slipper is at 2 stacks, increase Kasumi's Highlight damage by 30.0%/39.0%/39.0%/48.0%/48.0%/57.0%/57.0% more.
